root.sql:
select pka_com_function.fp_get_thaidate(sc_lon_m_contract.begining_of_contract ,'DD/MM/YYYY') as begining_of_contract ,sc_lon_m_rule.loan_type ,sc_lon_m_rule.loan_type_description ,count( sc_lon_m_contract.loan_contract_no) as c_count ,sum( sc_lon_m_contract.paid_first_amount) as c_app ,(select sc_acc_m_account_master.account_id from sc_acc_m_account_master where sc_lon_m_rule.account_id = sc_acc_m_account_master.account_id ) as account_id ,(select sc_acc_m_account_master.account_name from sc_acc_m_account_master where sc_lon_m_rule.account_id = sc_acc_m_account_master.account_id ) as account_name
from sc_lon_m_contract ,sc_lon_m_loan_card ,sc_lon_m_rule
where sc_lon_m_contract.loan_contract_no = sc_lon_m_loan_card.loan_contract_no and sc_lon_m_loan_card.loan_type = sc_lon_m_rule.loan_type and (sc_lon_m_loan_card.close_status is null OR sc_lon_m_loan_card.close_status = '0')
/*WHERE*/
group BY sc_lon_m_contract.begining_of_contract ,sc_lon_m_rule.account_id ,sc_lon_m_rule.loan_type ,sc_lon_m_rule.loan_type_description
